title: The Orissa (Alteration of Name) Act, 2011
full_text: The Orissa (Alteration of Name) Act, 2011 उड़ीसा (नाम-परिवर्तन) अधिनियम, 2011 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 201115 Act Number: 15 Enactment Date: 2011-09-23 Act Year: 2011 Short Title: The Orissa (Alteration of Name) Act, 2011 Hindi Title: उड़ीसा (नाम-परिवर्तन) अधिनियम, 2011 Long Title: An Act to alter the name of the State of Orissa. Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of States Enforcement Date: 01-11-2011 Notification: 1st November, 2011, vide notification No. G.S.R. 791(E), dated 1st November, 2011, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3 (i).
